rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1608px; height: 1px; padding-top: 14px; margin-left: 18px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 23px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Part A — Data Ingestion & Storage Infrastructure @ AIR Data Centre

switch.text: Part A — Data Ingestion & Storage Infrastructure @ AIR Data Centre

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 435px; margin-left: 29px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 23px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Part B — ML Classification & Expert Validation Loop

switch.text: Part B — ML Classification & Expert Validation Loop

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 80, 239), rgb(109, 178, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 29, 188), rgb(178, 203, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 187px; margin-left: 58px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
